title_en: The Road to AlphaFold: How DeepMind Bet on AGI and Cracked Biology's Hardest Problem
dek_en: A documentary-style talk traces Demis Hassabis and Shane Legg from a stealth London startup pitching "solve intelligence" to investors, through AlphaGo's Sputnik moment, to AlphaFold's solution of the 50-year-old protein folding problem. Th
title_zh: 从游戏到蛋白质：DeepMind 通往 AGI 的二十年
dek_zh: 这是一部关于 DeepMind 创始人 Demis Hassabis 与 Shane Legg 如何把"解决智能本身"作为人生目标的纪录片。片中两人反复主张：通用人工智能（AGI）已不再是遥远的科幻命题，而是一场正在他们手中加速的工程竞赛——可能比互联网、比移动互联网更重要，"更像是电或火的出现"。
